about_title_1: About the institute | Higher Institute of Computer Science and Management Information Systems
about_h1_16: Who we are and how we develop your career
about_p_17: The Higher Institute of Computer Science and Management Information Systems was established with an ambitious vision aiming to create technological and scientific leadership at the highest levels.
about_span_18: Message of the Dean of the Institute
about_h2_19: Welcome to the beacon of technological innovation
about_div_20: The fields of computer science, information technology, and artificial intelligence have witnessed tremendous development in recent times, and their role has grown across most areas of business — such as education, health, industry, agriculture, economics, accounting and management, and even entertainment and social communication.
about_p_21: As a result of the rapid pace at which these technologies evolve and their direct impact on our daily lives, it has become essential to advance the educational process in the fields of computer science and information technology to keep pace with these developments. Accordingly, the Higher Institute of Computer Science and Information Systems in the Fifth Settlement carries out its role in qualifying specialized technical cadres among the Institute’s graduates who are able to work efficiently with computer science and information technology across business fields.
about_p_21b: Within this framework, the Institute — with its human resources of faculty members and their assistants, in addition to its material capabilities — offers three academic programs that we continuously strive to develop, awarding a Bachelor’s degree in the following specializations: Computer Science • Management Information Systems • Accounting and Management.
about_p_21c: Best wishes to you all for success and prosperity.
about_h4_22: Prof. Dr. Abdel Wahab Kamel El-Sammak
about_span_23: Dean of the Higher Institute of Computer Science and Management Information Systems
about_p_25: To be at the forefront of distinguished educational institutions in computer science and information systems locally and regionally, and to contribute effectively to driving digital transformation and establishing a sustainable knowledge society.
about_p_27: Providing high-quality educational programs accredited in accordance with national standards, and providing a study environment that stimulates creativity and innovation, while developing students’ professional capabilities to meet the aspirations of the labor market and support applied scientific research.
about_h4_32: Developing the quality of curricula and education structure
about_p_33: We aim to constantly update the curriculum to keep pace with international standards and the aspirations of the renewed labor market, and to raise the efficiency of the educational infrastructure, including laboratories, halls, and smart teaching methods.
about_p_35: Providing financial and technical support for researchers and faculty members to conduct studies and publish research in major international journals, and establish student research groups to innovate solutions to societal problems.
about_h4_36: Promote social responsibility and technology partnerships
about_p_37: Concluding and activating cooperation protocols with major academic and technical companies to provide field training for students and effective participation in providing consulting services and initiatives that serve the environment and society.
about_p_40: All certificates and degrees awarded by the CIS Higher Institute are officially accredited and authenticated by the Ministry of Higher Education and Scientific Research and the Supreme Council of Universities in the Arab Republic of Egypt.
about_div_41: Accreditation by the Ministry of Higher Education
about_p_42: All decisions to establish, approve, and amend regulations are issued by official ministerial decisions and grant bachelor’s degrees equivalent to Egyptian university degrees.
about_div_43: Equivalency of the Supreme Council of Universities
about_p_44: The bachelor's degree granted by the institute is completely equivalent to the degree granted by the colleges of computers and information and business administrations in universities subject to Law No. 49 of 1972.
about_p_46: Graduates of the Computer Science Department have the right to register in the Software Engineers Syndicate and specialized professional unions, and graduates of the Information Systems Division have the right to register in the Commercial Syndicate immediately upon graduation.
about_span_49: A shield of sporting and scientific excellence
about_h2_52: Timeline of the development and history of the institute
about_p_53: Historical milestones and pivotal achievements that created the status of the Higher Institute of Computer Science and Management Information Systems.
about_p_55: A leading academic institution founded in 2001, committed to providing a first-class educational experience to contribute to the entrepreneurship of the digital future in Egypt and the Middle East.

research_span_15: Exploring the prospects of the technological future
research_p_17: We support innovative research projects, publish peer-reviewed scientific articles in international journals, and sponsor programming teams for the institute’s students in local and Arab hackathons.

research_h2_25: Achievements of the Institute’s programming teams
research_p_20: The laboratory provides an integrated technical environment equipped with workstations with high-performance graphics processors (NVIDIA GPUs) and cloud servers to conduct research and practical training in the fields of deep learning, robotics, and natural language processing.
research_p_26: Students of the Department of Computer Science and Information Systems compete in many national and international hackathons to solve complex problems using programming and algorithms.
